endpoints.name: Get the list of API tokens in an application.
endpoints.description: Get the list of API tokens in an application.

endpoints.description: Get an API token by ID.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{TOKEN_ID}} with a real token_id.

endpoints.description: Create a new API token in the application.

endpoints.name: Delete an API token.
endpoints.description: Delete an API token.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{TOKEN_ID}} with a real token_id.

endpoints.name: Get a device by ID
endpoints.description: Get details about an existing device by device ID.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{DEVICE_ID}} with a real device_id.

endpoints.name: Create or update a device
endpoints.description: Create a new device or update an existing one by device ID.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{DEVICE_ID}} with a real device_id.

endpoints.name: Delete a device
endpoints.description: Delete an existing device by device ID.

endpoints.name: Get device cloud properties
endpoints.description: Get all cloud property values of a device by device ID.

endpoints.name: Get device command history
endpoints.description: Get device command history
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{COMMAND_NAME}} with a real command_name. Replace {{COMPONENT_NAME}} with a real component_name. Replace {{DEVICE_ID}} with a real device_id.

endpoints.name: Execute a device command
endpoints.description: Execute a command on a device.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{COMMAND_NAME}} with a real command_name. Replace {{COMPONENT_NAME}} with a real component_name. Replace {{DEVICE_ID}} with a real device_id.
